title: Add a Dockerfile to a TypeScript app
description: Adds a Dockerfile (pnpm-deploy thin or nx-prune layered) and the deployable:docker tag. For nx-prune, also wires the prune target chain and excludes the project from @thdk/nx-pnpm-deploy.

project.description: The Nx project to add a Dockerfile to.
project.x-prompt: Which project would you like to add a Dockerfile to?

strategy.description: pnpm-deploy: thin image via @thdk/nx-pnpm-deploy. nx-prune: layered cache via prune-lockfile + workspace_modules.

items.label: nx-prune — layered cache, offline pnpm install (uses @nx/js:prune-lockfile)

port.description: Default PORT env value baked into the Dockerfile.
